articles.description: Mohamed Salah is once again regularly starting for Liverpool but is this the start of a long goodbye for the record-breaking Egyptian at Anfield

articles.description: England captain Leah Williamson tells presenter Kelly Somers about her journey in football - and life away from the game.
articles.title: Leah Williamson: England captain on World Cup dreams and life away from football

articles.description: England's win over New Zealand felt a return to the good times under Brendon McCullum but there are only so many times you can go to the well, writes Matthew Henry.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: 'Baz said play like Sehwag' - England's win over New Zealand felt like the good times

articles.description: Argentina captain Lionel Messi is hauled to the ground by a pitch invader during Inter Miami's friendly in Puerto Rico.
articles.title: Lionel Messi tackled to the ground by pitch invader during Inter Miami match

articles.description: Benfica suspend five supporters for racist incidents following the recent Champions League game against Real Madrid.

articles.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander marks his return from injury with 36 points as the Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Denver Nuggets 127-121 in overtime.
articles.title: NBA: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander guides Oklahoma City Thunder to victory after injury

articles.description: West Ham will need to sell players this summer even if they avoid relegation from the Premier League, after revealing a £104.2m loss for the last financial year.
articles.title: West Ham face summer player sales after £104m loss
